stories.headline: Bitcoin tracks best month in a year as USDT supply nears $150B
stories.tldr: BTC trades near $78,060, up 13% in April, on pace for its strongest monthly close since spring 2025 as USDT supply expands $5B.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Stablecoin liquidity, not spot ETF flows, is now the dominant fuel for the rebound — a structural shift traders should price into May positioning.
the_details: BTC at $78,060 per CoinDesk index, +13% MTD, snapping a multi-month losing streak.
Tether's USDT supply approaches $150B, adding $5B in April alone, lifting market liquidity.
CoinShares logs $1.4B in crypto fund inflows last week — strongest since January 2026.

stories.headline: 100+ crypto firms pressure Senate to mark up Clarity Act this week
stories.tldr: A coalition led by Coinbase and Ripple is demanding the Senate Banking Committee finally mark up the Clarity Act and finalize SEC-CFTC roles.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The U.S. market-structure bill is the unlock for institutional crypto rails — every week of delay extends regulatory ambiguity for builders and exchanges.
the_details: Letter flags six priorities including stablecoin rewards, SEC/CFTC oversight split, and non-custodial dev protections.
Coalition includes Coinbase, Ripple, and 100+ industry signatories per CoinDesk reporting.
Senate markup faces an April setback amid disputes over stablecoin yield language.

stories.headline: BlackRock IBIT options open interest tops Deribit for first time
stories.tldr: Options open interest on BlackRock's IBIT spot Bitcoin ETF eclipsed Deribit's BTC book Friday, signaling a structural shift to U.S. regulated derivatives.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: When the regulated wrapper outweighs the offshore venue, hedging behavior, vol pricing, and inflows start dictating BTC's intraday tape — not Asia futures.
the_details: IBIT options OI surpassed Deribit BTC OI on Friday, per CoinDesk markets desk.
Marks rapid institutional adoption of CFTC/SEC-supervised crypto derivatives.
Confirms pattern of liquidity migrating onshore as Clarity Act work continues.

stories.headline: Solana flips Ethereum on weekly dApp revenue for 5th straight week
stories.tldr: Solana has outearned Ethereum in weekly decentralized application revenue for five consecutive weeks even as SOL trades flat near $86.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Revenue durability — not TVL — is becoming the credible L1 KPI, and Solana's streak strengthens the bull case for SOL beta even with altseason indicators frozen at 33.
the_details: SOL changes hands at $85.97, pinned to its 50-day MA but under a death cross vs. 200-day at $131.2.
Spot SOL ETFs added $35.17M in net inflows last week; Goldman holds a reported $108M position.
Altcoin season index sits at 33–38/100, signaling capital still hasn't rotated out of BTC.

stories.headline: Bitcoin-dollar correlation hits -0.90, most extreme inverse since 2022
stories.tldr: BTC's 30-day correlation with the U.S. Dollar Index has deepened to -0.90, the most negative reading in nearly four years per CoinDesk data.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Bitcoin is trading like a clean dollar-debasement hedge again — DXY weakness, not risk-on flows, is the cleanest BTC tell heading into the FOMC window.
the_details: 30-day BTC/DXY correlation now -0.90, lowest since 2022 per CoinDesk Daybook.
BTC pushed past $78,000 after Trump extended the U.S.–Iran ceasefire midweek.
Pentagon-backed inflation warning briefly stalled BTC's run at $80,000.
